client_access_token.description: eBay OAuth user access token with the sell.finances scope, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <client_access_token>). Never logged.

base_url.description: eBay Sell Finances API base URL. Defaults to the production endpoint; override for eBay's sandbox environment or test proxies.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound for transactions/payouts/transfers, sent as a date-range filter (e.g. transactionDate:[<start_date>..]). Only used on a fresh sync with no persisted cursor.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
